overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The player navigates a vehicle through urban streets, passing under elevated highways, stopping at traffic lights, and driving through covered commercial corridors with massive digital billboards. The footage features high-fidelity ray-traced graphics with vibrant pink and blue neon lighting.

segments.scene_description: Driving through a semi-covered urban corridor beneath elevated highways, following a white delivery truck. Neon signs illuminate the right side of the street while concrete overpasses frame the view ahead. The truck ahead turns right and exits the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital billboards

events.description: approaching red traffic light at major intersection
coming to complete stop at red light behind crosswalk

agents.ego_description: decelerating toward intersection and stopping at red traffic light

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at corner to cross street

wide intersection with crosswalk markings and traffic signals

segments.scene_description: Continuing down an open commercial street with massive digital billboards on the right. The vehicle slows and stops at a red traffic light at a major intersection, where pedestrians wait at the crosswalk corners.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection transitioning to covered avenue

events.description: traffic light changes to green, proceeding through intersection
entering covered urban canyon with overhead structures

tunnel-like entrance to covered commercial street

segments.scene_description: Proceeding through the green light and executing a left turn at the intersection, driving alongside a red sedan. The scene transitions from the open intersection into a covered urban canyon with overhead structures and digital displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial corridor with overhead digital displays

agents.ego_description: cruising through covered urban canyon passing beneath large suspended digital screens

entered.detail: massive suspended screens displaying advertisements spanning the roadway
overhead metal and glass canopy covering the street

segments.scene_description: Driving through a covered commercial corridor where the street is sheltered by overhead structures. Massive digital billboards hang above the roadway, casting colorful light onto the scene. The environment feels enclosed with building walls close on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a neon-lit urban corridor that gradually opens into a wide, bustling commercial intersection. It begins beneath the heavy concrete frames of elevated highways, trailing a white delivery truck amidst a glow of pink and blue neon signs. As the truck turns right and disappears from view, the environment expands into an open street dominated by massive, towering digital billboards. The camera then glides forward through the vibrant city lights before slowing to a complete stop at a red traffic light, where pedestrians gather at the corners of the major crossing.

The shot follows a continuous drive from an open city intersection into a claustrophobic, neon-lit commercial corridor. It begins as the vehicle proceeds through a green light and executes a left turn, gliding alongside a red sedan. As the car moves forward, the open space of the intersection gradually narrows, transitioning into a covered urban canyon defined by overhead structures and digital displays. The scene then shifts into a fully enclosed corridor where towering building walls press in from both sides. Finally, the environment becomes a tunnel of light as massive digital billboards hang above the roadway, casting vibrant, colorful glows across the sheltered street.
